caption: Idle-speed friction: a unit's speed now bleeds off gradually instead of snapping to zero the instant it stops locomoting with nothing left to chase or march toward. A lone Cavalry regiment charges and wipes out a single weak Infantry regiment; once the last enemy on the field dies, the cavalry has no target and no move order, but is still carrying real charge speed. Watch the HUD speed label (Settings.show_unit_speed) hold near the charge speed through the brief fight, then visibly count down over a couple of seconds instead of instantly reading '0.0 m/s'.
